mapper.select:
SELECT pim.PBNS_ID , pim.PBNS_TTL , pim.PBNS_CON , pim.DEL_YN , pim.RGSN_USER_ID , pim.RGSN_TS , pim.AMNN_USER_ID , pim.AMNN_TS
, CASE WHEN file_cnt.FILE_COUNT != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FILE_YN FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PBNS_INFO_M pim LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PBNS_ID, NVL(COUNT(0), 0) AS FILE_COUNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PBNS_ATCH_R GROUP BY PBNS_ID ) file_cnt ON pim.PBNS_ID = file_cnt.PBNS_ID WHERE 1=1 AND pim.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND ( UPPER(pim.PBNS_TTL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' OR UPPER(pim.PBNS_CON) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(pim.RGSN_USER_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchUser}) || '%'
ORDER BY pim.RGSN_TS DESC
SELECT PBNS_ID , PBNS_TTL , PBNS_CON , DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PBNS_INFO_M WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND PBNS_ID = #{pbnsId}

SELECT par.PBNS_ID , par.ATCH_ID , tbivf.FILE_ID , tbivf.FILE_NM , par.RGSN_USER_ID , par.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PBNS_ATCH_R par LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M tbivf ON par.ATCH_ID = tbivf.FILE_ID WHERE par.PBNS_ID = #{pbnsId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_PBNS_INFO_M SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{params.amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=1 AND PBNS_ID = #{params.pbnsId}
